name: souroldgeezer-design
description: Reference-driven design skills for sustainable software, responsive web UI, and HTTP APIs. Covers code/module/script boundaries and dependencies, WCAG™ 2.2 AA responsive UI, HTTP API design with Azure® Functions™ runtime, Node.js® hosted/serverless and hosted Next.js™ runtime extensions, Azure® Cosmos DB™ / Azure® Blob Storage™ data extensions, matching Claude Code subagents, and Codex skill metadata.

interface.shortDescription: Reference-driven software, UI, and API design.
interface.longDescription: Build, extract, review, and look up sustainable software design, responsive UI, and API design guidance with bundled references.
defaultPrompt: Review this module design for coupling and boundary risks.
Review this UI against the responsive design reference.
Design or review this API contract and implementation surface.
